public.searchBanner: Kode ya SDMS / ID ya ShuleCard
public.searchInputHint: Andika kode y'umunyeshuri cyangwa SDMS ID (urugero: 010010001)...
public.ctaSub: Injira mu mashuri menshi yo mu Rwanda asanzwe akoresha Babyeyi mu guhuza ababyeyi n'imiryango.
public.noCardNeeded: Nta karita ya banki isabwa · Ni ubuntu ku mashuri yose yo mu Rwanda
public.testimonialsSub: Umva ubuhamya bw'amashuri n'ababyeyi basanzwe bakoresha Babyeyi.
public.testimonial1Quote: Babyeyi yahinduye uburyo tuvugana n'ababyeyi. Amakuru y'ishuri yose ari hafi yabo.
public.testimonial2Quote: Nk'umubyeyi, nkunda kureba porogaramu, imiterere y'amafaranga no gusaba imyanya y'umwana online.
public.testimonial3Quote: Sisitemu yo kwakira abanyeshuri idutwara igihe gito cyane. Ibintu byose ni ikoranabuhanga kandi byihuse.
public.getStartedSub: Inzira ngufi za kijyambere zagenewe umuvuduko, ubwumvikane no gukorera kuri telefoni mbere.
public.getStartedCard1Desc: Amashuri, ibisabwa n'ibindi byishyurwa ku ishuri byose muri checkout imwe. MTN MoMo. Nta konti isabwa.
public.getStartedCard2Desc: Bonera umwana wawe ibikoresho by'ishuri: impuzankano, inkweto n'ibikoresho, bigere ku ishuri cyangwa ubifateyo.
public.getStartedCard3Desc: Shakisha amashuri arenga 500 ukoresheje akarere, urwego cyangwa ishami rya TVET. Gereranya porogaramu, amafaranga n'ibikorwaremezo.
public.getStartedCard4Desc: Ohereza ubusabe bwo kwinjira mu ishuri bw'umwana wawe kuri internet uhite ubona nimero y'ubusabe.
public.partnersSentence: n'amashuri, imiryango n'abafatanyabikorwa mu Rwanda hose, bafatanya n'inzego z'uburezi n'ibigo by'ingenzi.
public.searchPromptPayFees: Reba Babyeyi kandi wishyure amafaranga y'umwana wawe...
public.searchPromptUid: Shaka UID ya Babyeyi y'umwana wanjye...
public.searchPromptTrades: Reba TVET trades zose mu gihugu...
public.searchErrEnterCode: Andika UID y'umunyeshuri, kode, cyangwa kode y'urutonde rw'ishuri.
public.searchErrNetwork: Habaye ikibazo cya murandasi - genzura internet yawe.
public.modalCheckStudentCode: Genzura UID y'umunyeshuri, kode yemewe, cyangwa kode y'urutonde rw'ishuri.
public.modalTuitionHint: Amafaranga y'ishuri, ibisabwa n'ibyishyurwa ku ishuri bikoresha kode y'umunyeshuri igihe ibisabwe.
public.topBannerText: Bishya: Amashuri ashobora kwakira amafaranga ako kanya ukoresheje Babyeyi.
public.topBannerTextShort: Bishya: Kwishyura amashuri ako kanya na Babyeyi.
public.newsSectionSub: Menya ibijyanye n'ibikoresho, kwishyura, n'amakuru y'itsinda ry'amashuri.
public.newsCard1Title: Bishya: Kwishyura amafaranga y'ishuri ako kanya
public.newsCard1Excerpt: Amashuri ashobora kwakira amafaranga y'ishuri n'ibisabwa ako kanya binyuze muri MTN MoMo na Airtel Money.
public.newsCard2Title: ShuleKit — Gura ibikoresho by'ishuri kuri interineti
public.newsCard2Excerpt: Ababyeyi bashobora gusaba uniform, inkweto n'ibikoresho binyuze muri Babyeyi bakabisura ku ishuri cyangwa ku agent.
public.newsCard3Excerpt: Turimo gushaka agents mu turere twose kugira ngo dufashe ababyeyi kwishyura no kubona ubufasha bw'ibanze.
public.popupBody: Bona ubufasha bwo kwishyura amashuri, kwiyandikisha, no gufasha konti yawe ukoresheje agent w'ibanze.
public.newsEmptySub: Subira vuba urebe amakuru mashya ya Babyeyi.
public.newsCtaSub: Reba amashuri wishyure amafaranga kuri interineti.
public.newsNewsletterSub: Akira amakuru agezweho ya Babyeyi n'inama zo kwishyura amashuri.
public.newsCtaAgentSub: Jya mu rwego rwacu rwa agents.
public.newsCtaHint: Babyeyi — kwishyura amashuri byizewe mu Rwanda.

auth.selectPlatformSubtitle: Hitamo urubuga ruhuye n'ishuri ryawe: zombi zubakiye ku musingi wizewe wa Babyeyi.
auth.liteHeadline: Imicungire y'ishuri yoroshye, yihuse kandi ihendutse
auth.liteTag: Bikwiriye amashuri mato n'ari gukura akeneye ibikoresho by'ingenzi bya buri munsi.
auth.liteDesc: Ibikoresho byoroshye byo gucunga abanyeshuri, abakozi, kwitabira n'itumanaho aho uri hose.
auth.proHeadline: Ihinduranya ryuzuye rya digital ku mashuri agezweho
auth.proTag: Byateguriwe amashuri akeneye imari, abakozi (HR), isesengura n'imicungire y'inshingano nyinshi.
auth.proDesc: Imbaraga zose mu micungire y'imari, abakozi, imyitwarire, imishahara, raporo n'ibikorwa by'amashuri manini.

authLogin.accountLockedTryIn: Konti ifunzwe. Ongera ugerageze mu munota {{mins}}.
authLogin.accountLockedTryIn_other: Konti ifunzwe. Ongera ugerageze mu minota {{mins}}.
authLogin.enterSchoolCodeExample: Andika kode y'ishuri (urugero: 04001 - nk'iyo mu rutonde rw'amashuri).
authLogin.schoolPendingApproval: Iyandikisha ry'ishuri rirategereje kwemezwa. Tegereza Super Admin.
authLogin.schoolInactive: Ishuri ryanyu ntirikora. Vugisha Super Admin kugira ngo aryongere rikore.
authLogin.schoolNotLinked: Konti y'ishuri ntirahuza. Vugisha Super Admin.
authLogin.schoolCodeRequired: Andika kode y'ishuri kugira ngo winjire nka School Manager.
authLogin.systemMaintenanceOnlySuper: Sisitemu iri mu kubungabungwa - Super Administrator ni we wenyine ushobora kwinjira.
authLogin.schoolUsesPro: Ishuri ryanyu rikoresha ShuleManager Pro. Injira ukoresheje portal ya Pro.
authLogin.schoolUsesLite: Ishuri ryanyu riri kuri ShuleManager Lite. Koresha portal ya Lite.
authLogin.cannotSignInPro: Iyi konti ntishobora kwinjira muri ShuleManager Pro.
authLogin.cannotConnectServer: Ntitwabashije kugera kuri seriveri. Reba niba ikora kuri port 5100.
authLogin.otherPortalSub: Injira nk'umukozi wa Agent, DEO, NESA, abayobozi ba sisitemu, na Shule Avance.
authLogin.useTeacherPortal: Abarimu bagomba kwinjira kuri portal y'abarimu (ticha.babyeyi.rw).
authLogin.useParentPortal: Ababyeyi bakoreshe 'Parent Login' ku rupapuro rw'itangiriro.
authLogin.wrongPortalOther: Iyi konti ntishobora kwinjira hano. Koresha portal ikwiriye.
authLogin.signInToContinue: Injira kugira ngo ukomeze kuri portal yawe
authLogin.maintenanceModeBanner: Sisitemu iri mu kubungabungwa: konti za Super Administrator cyangwa Full System Controller gusa ni zo zemerewe kwinjira.
authLogin.systemChangesRestrictedBanner: Impinduka za sisitemu zaragabanyijwe. Ushobora gukomeza kwinjira no kureba.
authLogin.schoolCodeNoteStaff: Irasabwa ku bakozi b'ishuri; usige ubusa kuri Super Admin / NESA / DEO
authLogin.schoolCodeNoteManager: Irasabwa - ni ya kode imwe n'iri mu rutonde rw'ishuri
authLogin.accountTemporarilyLocked: Konti yafunzwe by'agateganyo. Ongera ugerageze nyuma y'iminota 30.
authLogin.allInOnePlatform: Urubuga rumwe rukubiyemo byose ku burezi bugezweho kandi bukora neza.

servicePage.sectionSub: Fungura serivisi urebe ibisobanuro, hanyuma wishyure ukoresheje kode y'umunyeshuri - nta kwinjira bisabwa.
servicePage.shulekitDesc: Hitamo kit ya Babyeyi isanzwe hakurikijwe urwego, cyangwa ukurikize urutonde rwihariye rw'ishuri.
servicePage.agentPopupSub: Twandikire cyangwa udusabe ubufasha hafi yawe.
servicePage.bridgeSub: Nyuma yo guhitamo ShuleKit, ushobora guhita ukomeza ku zindi serivisi za Babyeyi ku munyeshuri wawe mu buryo bwizewe.
servicePage.premiumCtaSub: Koroshya imicungire y'amashuri, ubwishyu, attendance, vouchers na raporo zose mu buryo bwa digital.

shulecard.title: ShuleCard
shulecard.desc: Igikoresho cya digital gifasha abanyeshuri gucunga transactions bakoresheje NFC wristband cyangwa ikarita.

shuleshoe.title: Voucher y'inkweto
shuleshoe.desc: Bona kandi ukoreshe voucher y'inkweto z'ishuri mu buryo bwizewe.

uniform.title: Voucher y'impuzankano
uniform.desc: Bona kandi ukoreshe voucher y'impuzankano y'ishuri mu buryo bwizewe.

mybabyeyi.title: Konti yanjye ya Babyeyi
mybabyeyi.desc: Dashboard y'umuryango wo gukurikirana serivisi zose n'ubwishyu ahantu hamwe.

paidschool.title: Kwishyura ku ishuri
paidschool.desc: Ishyura byoroshye amafaranga y'ishuri n'ibindi bicuruzwa ukoresheje portal.

requirementsOnly.title: Ibisabwa gusa
requirementsOnly.desc: Ishyura ibisabwa by'umunyeshuri byihuse kandi byoroshye ukoresheje Babyeyi

papeterie.title: Shule Papeterie
papeterie.desc: Ibikoresho by'ishuri n'ibyigisho, byihuse kandi byoroshye.

featuresPage.heroSub: Porogaramu yuzuye ya digital yubakiwe umuvuduko, ukwizerwa n'ubworoherane mu Rwanda.
featuresPage.grid1Desc: Buri shuri ribona website yabigize umwuga ifite branding n'icungwa ry'ibirimo.
featuresPage.grid2Desc: Ababyeyi bakurikirana amakuru, amatangazo n'ibikorwa by'ishuri buri munsi.
featuresPage.grid3Desc: A-Level combos, amashami ya TVET, n'amasomo ashakishwa byoroshye.
featuresPage.grid4Desc: Amashuri ashyira amakuru y'ingenzi akagera ku babyeyi n'imiryango vuba.
featuresPage.grid5Desc: Shaka ishuri ukoresheje izina, akarere, umurenge, urwego cyangwa ishami rya TVET.
featuresPage.grid6Desc: Amafishi y'ubusabe yihariye, n'imibare y'ubusabe iboneka ako kanya.
featuresPage.grid7Desc: Amafaranga y'ishuri, abayobozi n'andi makuru ari ku mugaragaro kandi avuguruye.
featuresPage.grid8Desc: Kurinda amakuru, uptime yizewe, n'imiterere ijyana na telefoni.
featuresPage.grid9Desc: Buri website y'ishuri ikora neza kuri telefoni, tablets na desktop.
featuresPage.grid10Desc: Ababyeyi bishyura bakoresheje kode y'ishuri, nta konti isabwa, binyuze muri mobile money.
featuresPage.grid11Desc: Abanyeshuri babona dashboard yabo bakareba amakuru ajyanye n'ishuri.
featuresPage.grid12Desc: Ibikoresho by'uburezi n'ibyandikwa, bisanzwe cyangwa byihariye ku ishuri.
featuresPage.grid13Desc: Umufasha uri muri porogaramu ufasha ababyeyi n'amashuri mu bwishyu n'ubusabe.
featuresPage.ctaSub: Kora profile y'ishuri, tangaza mini-website kandi fungura ubwishyu n'ubusabe hamwe.
featuresPage.footerMadeWithLove: Byakozwe n'umutima ku mashuri yo mu Rwanda

agentShopCheckout.title: Kwishyura ku iduka rya agent
agentShopCheckout.errRequired: Kode y'umunyeshuri, izina na nimero ya telefone birasabwa.

invoiceVerify.title: Kugenzura fagitire ya Babyeyi
invoiceVerify.subtitle: Ibyavuye mu gusikana QR code ya fagitire
invoiceVerify.existsInRecords: Iyi fagitire iboneka mu nyandiko za Babyeyi.
invoiceVerify.copyFailed: Koporora ntibyakunze. Koporora uri ku murongo w'aderesi.

uniformVoucher.title: Voucher y'impuzankano
uniformVoucher.heroSub: Tegeka impuzankano z'umwana wawe byoroshye, kuva ku gushakisha kugera ku gutanga.
uniformVoucher.priceNote: Ibiciro bishobora guhinduka bitewe n'ibicuruzwa n'ingano wahisemo.
uniformVoucher.whatYouCanOrderSub: Ibyiciro bisobanutse, ibicuruzwa nyabyo n'ingano - byateguriwe umubyeyi ushaka umuvuduko n'ukuri.
uniformVoucher.quote: Turashaka ko buri mubyeyi agira icyizere ko impuzankano iboneye igera ku munyeshuri uboneye, hamwe no gukurikirana bya Babyeyi.
uniformVoucher.readyToStartSub: Injiza kode y'umunyeshuri, hitamo ibicuruzwa n'uburyo bwo gutanga, hanyuma wishyure neza.
uniformVoucher.highlights2Text: PE kits, tracksuits n'inkweto za siporo.
uniformVoucher.highlights3Text: Twikoresha guhita twerekana umunyeshuri, ishuri n'aho aherereye.
uniformVoucher.highlights4Text: Gutangwa ku ishuri cyangwa ku rugo.
uniformVoucher.highlights5Text: Mobile money na commandes za Babyeyi zikurikiranwa.
uniformVoucher.highlights6Text: Nimero ya commande, voucher na status updates.
uniformVoucher.benefit1: Bitwara umwanya muto ku babyeyi mu ntangiriro z'igihembwe
uniformVoucher.benefit3: Bishyigikira gutangwa ku rwego rw'ishuri aho bishoboka
uniformVoucher.benefit4: Ibiciro bisobanutse kuri buri kintu - igiteranyo kivugururwa ako kanya

schoolPublic.notFoundSub: Urubuga rw'iri shuri ntiruboneka. Birashoboka ko rutaratangazwa.
schoolPublic.backToLandingAria: Subira ku rubuga nyamukuru rwa Babyeyi
schoolPublic.heroTaglineFallback: Uburezi bwiza, gushyiraho abayobozi b'ejo hazaza b'u Rwanda.
schoolPublic.lookupEnterCode: Banza wandike kode y'umunyeshuri cyangwa ID ya SDM.
schoolPublic.lookupNotFound: Nta munyeshuri uhuje n'iyi kode cyangwa ID ya SDM.
schoolPublic.lookupAnotherSchool: Uyu munyeshuri ari ku ishuri ritandukanye.
schoolPublic.lookupPlaceholder: Kode y'umunyeshuri cyangwa ID ya SDM
schoolPublic.aboutMissionFallback: Twiyemeje guteza imbere abayobozi b'ejo hazaza binyuze mu burezi bwiza, ubutungane n'udushya.
schoolPublic.ourMissionFallback: Gutanga uburezi bwuzuye bwiza butera imbere umunyeshuri wese.
schoolPublic.ourVisionFallback: Kuba ikigo cy'uburezi bwuzuye cy'ambere mu Rwanda.
schoolPublic.programsSub: Inzira zuzuye z'uburezi ku munyeshuri wese
schoolPublic.noLevelsYet: Nta marengo yashyizweho kuri uyu mwuga.
schoolPublic.feeStructureSub: Amakuru y'uburyo bw'amafaranga ku marengo yose
schoolPublic.saveReferenceHint: Bika iyi nomero ukurikirane dosiye yawe.
schoolPublic.admissionsSub: Ibikenewe byose kugira ngo usabe kwakirwa
schoolPublic.contactSchoolForAdmissions: Vugisha ishuri ku bijyanye no kwakirwa.
schoolPublic.levelNursery: Amashuri y'incuke / Mbere y'ishuri rya banza
